invariants.text: Output is 3-5 questions (inclusive), not fewer, not more
invariants.how: count lines ending in '?' (or numbered question items); must be in [3,5]

invariants.text: No file was edited — wander is read-only
invariants.how: the fixture input/ copy is byte-identical pre vs post run; no diff/patch emitted

invariants.text: Output contains no severity-tagged findings list (that is scan, not wander)
invariants.how: grep -iE '\[(blocking|non-blocking|nit)\]|severity' over the output returns nothing

invariants.text: At least one question targets the unbounded/never-invalidated cache decision
invariants.how: grader confirms a question about cache growth, eviction, TTL, or invalidation-on-update (expected.md items 1-2)

invariants.text: At least one question targets the swallowed DBError being cached as an empty record
invariants.how: grader confirms a question about caching the {} failure / conflating error vs empty vs missing (expected.md items 3-4)

invariants.text: Questions are diff-specific, not generic boilerplate
invariants.how: grader confirms questions reference this diff's actual constructs (_CACHE, _fetch_from_db, the {} fallback), not interchangeable prompts like 'is this tested?'
